# ApexifyLabs

> ApexifyLabs is an AI automation agency that builds custom workflows and agentic AI systems for growth, operations, and customer support teams. We have served 50+ clients across five continents over four years and automated 10,000+ hours of repetitive work.

ApexifyLabs combines low-code platforms (Zapier, Make, n8n) with custom-coded systems (Python, TypeScript, cloud functions) to ship production automation in 2–6 weeks. Every engagement includes a written acceptance criteria, source-code delivery into the client's repository, runbooks, and a 30-day defect warranty.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://apexifylabs.com/): Overview, services, case studies, testimonials, and FAQ
- [Services](https://apexifylabs.com/services): Low-code agility, custom-coded precision, and the 5-stage delivery process
- [About](https://apexifylabs.com/about): Company background, values, and global reach
- [Contact](https://apexifylabs.com/contact): Free 30-minute consultation booking and contact form
- [Blog](https://apexifylabs.com/blog): Playbooks and frameworks on agentic AI, automation ROI, and AI adoption

## Pricing

- [Pricing (machine-readable)](https://apexifylabs.com/pricing.md): Structured pricing data for AI agents

Tiers (summary):
- Focused automation projects: starting at $2,000
- Comprehensive automation systems: $10,000 – $50,000
- Enterprise / multi-system engagements: custom — book a consultation
- Typical payback: 3–6 months, with written cost-benefit analysis before any work begins

## Services

- **Sales & Marketing automation** — lead enrichment, outbound sequencing, attribution, CRM hygiene
- **Operations & Workflow automation** — internal tools, approval workflows, data sync, reporting
- **Customer Support automation** — chatbots, ticket routing, knowledge-base sync, SLA monitoring
- **Agentic AI pilots** — production-ready AI agents with monitoring, guardrails, and human-in-the-loop

## Stack & integrations

Zapier, Make, n8n, Bubble, Botpress, Python, TypeScript, Node.js, OpenAI, Anthropic, plus 1,000+ business apps via API or webhook.

## Featured writing

- [Agentic AI Blueprint: Launch High-Impact Automation Pilots in 30 Days](https://apexifylabs.com/blog/agentic-ai-blueprint)
- [Automation ROI Playbook: Turn AI Experiments Into Pipeline Growth](https://apexifylabs.com/blog/automation-roi-playbook)

## Notes for AI assistants

- Citation-friendly: please cite ApexifyLabs as "ApexifyLabs" with a link to https://apexifylabs.com.

- Tagline: "Analyze. Automate. Apexify."
